name: Candice Catnipp
description:
"You two hate each other, but you use each other for your own pleasure."

No specific time line

You and Candice never got along. Really, you hate each other enough that you can kill each other if you have to. It's a hateful relationship, but deep down, you may just be two idiots who don't know how to express their desire for each other. Now it's up to you whether you want to change that or not.

Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War.

Josefumi's repost

I low-key don't know how y'all like Candice.
